preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: Look, there are slimes blocking the path ahead.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: They seem weak. Good practice for our first fight together.

preBattle.speaker: Sera
preBattle.text: Stay close, everyone. I'll keep you healed.

preBattle.speaker: Kael
preBattle.text: Hold up. I can see goblins hiding in the bushes.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: An ambush? Then we'll meet them head-on!

preBattle.speaker: Kael
preBattle.text: Or we could be smart about it. Just saying.

preBattle.speaker: Sera
preBattle.text: I hear howling. There's a wolf pack nearby.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: Dire wolves. They hunt in packs. Watch each other's backs.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: They're fast, but I can slow them down with my ice magic.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: A graveyard... I can feel dark magic in the air.

preBattle.speaker: Sera
preBattle.text: The dead are stirring. Someone has disturbed their rest.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: Then we'll put them back to rest. Stay sharp!

preBattle.speaker: Kael
preBattle.text: This tower reeks of dark sorcery.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: A dark mage dwells here. I can feel their power.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: Magic or not, they'll fall to my blade. Let's go!

preBattle.speaker: Sera
preBattle.text: Be careful. Their spells could be dangerous.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: An orc stronghold. These warriors won't go down easy.

preBattle.speaker: Kael
preBattle.text: I count two orcs and a goblin scout. We're outnumbered.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: Numbers don't matter when you have fire on your side.

preBattle.speaker: Sera
preBattle.text: This place... it's consecrated to darkness.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: Two dark mages and an orc guard. This won't be easy.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: We've come too far to turn back. Forward!

preBattle.speaker: Kael
preBattle.text: That's... that's an ancient dragon.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: Its power is immense. We must be strategic.

preBattle.speaker: Sera
preBattle.text: I'll do everything I can to keep everyone alive.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: This is what we've been training for. Let's slay a dragon!

preBattle.speaker: Kael
preBattle.text: A bandit camp. These rogues prey on travelers.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: Time to clean up these roads.

preBattle.speaker: Kael
preBattle.text: I almost feel bad fighting my own kind. Almost.

preBattle.speaker: Sera
preBattle.text: I sense restless spirits here. And something darker.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: Phantoms and skeletons. The undead are stronger in these ruins.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: Steel may not work well on ghosts. Lyra, we need your magic.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: Stone golems. They're incredibly tough.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: My sword barely scratches them. We need to find their weakness.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: Magic can penetrate stone. Leave it to me.

preBattle.speaker: Kael
preBattle.text: It's freezing in here. I can barely feel my fingers.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: Ice elementals and a phantom. The cold empowers them.

preBattle.speaker: Sera
preBattle.text: Stay warm, everyone. I'll keep healing through the frost.

preBattle.speaker: Sera
preBattle.text: A necromancer... the source of all this undeath.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: They command the dead. We must defeat them to end this.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: If we stop the necromancer, the undead will fall.

preBattle.speaker: Kael
preBattle.text: Then let's make this quick.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: This is it. They've gathered their strongest warriors.

preBattle.speaker: Kael
preBattle.text: An orc, a bandit, a dark mage, and a golem. Lovely.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: We fight as one. Together, we can't be stopped.

preBattle.speaker: Sera
preBattle.text: I believe in all of you. Let's do this.

preBattle.speaker: Roland
preBattle.text: The final battle. A necromancer and a dragon stand before us.

preBattle.speaker: Lyra
preBattle.text: Everything we've fought for comes down to this moment.

preBattle.speaker: Kael
preBattle.text: No turning back now. Let's finish this.

preBattle.speaker: Sera
preBattle.text: Together, we are unstoppable. For the world!

postBattle.speaker: Roland
postBattle.text: We did it... We actually did it!

postBattle.speaker: Lyra
postBattle.text: The darkness is vanquished. The world is safe once more.

postBattle.speaker: Sera
postBattle.text: I'm so proud of all of you.

postBattle.speaker: Kael
postBattle.text: Not bad for a bunch of adventurers. Not bad at all.
